stories.quote: Raise and Learn changed my life. The after-school program gave me the support I needed to excel in my studies. Now I'm heading to college with a full scholarship!
stories.author: Maria Rodriguez

stories.quote: As a volunteer, I've witnessed firsthand the incredible impact this organization has on our community. It's inspiring to see students grow and thrive.
stories.author: James Chen

stories.quote: The literacy program helped me learn to read at 45 years old. I can now read to my grandchildren. This organization gave me a gift I'll treasure forever.
stories.author: Patricia Williams
